data.content:
[implementation-review] Approved.

Diff review:
- TAXONOMY.md: +48 / -2, single file, no code paths touched.
- All citations grep-verified at current line numbers.
- Anti-pattern section is greppable (gives the literal patterns to
  search for).
- Cross-reference to agent-session-runtime-events.ts:1-27 keeps the
  TAXONOMY entry and the source-of-truth docstring linked.
- Fixed one nit: replaced placeholder anchor `[foolery-2dd7](#)`
  with literal `\`foolery-2dd7\`` knot reference.
- Markdown lints clean, tsc clean, 3041 tests green.
- `<!-- human -->` markers ensure /taxonomize preserves the entries.

Acceptance from knot description, all met:
- ✅ TAXONOMY.md `result` entry present, matches contract verbatim
  where verbatim was specified.
- ✅ `Turn` entry rewritten without "one result out" loose phrasing,
  links to new section.
- ✅ Citations point to actual normalizer functions at current
  line numbers.
- ✅ Lint/typecheck/test green.

Approve and advance to shipment.
